results.title: Unreal Engine: Make something unreal | Product Hunt
results.content:
Zac Zuo
Flowtica Scribe

Flowtica Scribe

Hi everyone!  
  
UE 5.8 is the last big update before Epic moves on to UE6.  
  
One interesting part is the experimental MCP plugin.  
  
It lets AI agents connect to the Unreal Editor, understand the engine and the current project, and help with assets, systems, testing, and optimization.  
  
So is it the right time to vibe code some real games? :)  
  
btw, you don’t need to pay Unreal royalties until your game hits $1M.  
  
5.8 also adds Sandboxes. You can experiment in an isolated space, keep only the changes you want, and avoid polluting the main project.  
  
Mesh Terrain is another fun one: a new 3D mesh-based terrain system, so worlds are no longer limited to heightfields — much more room to play!

ReadyCode
Michał Szklarski [...] Unreal Engine

remove.bg

remove.bg

Hey there! We do offer free downloads of images at the preview size, which is an image up to 625 x 400 pixels. While you do need a credit to download an image of a larger size, you can always sign up for an account for one free credit! And if you need more credits after that, you can find our pricing for credits here: remove.bg/pricing

Malik Bhai

@gato tanks The quality drop on free previews is a huge bottleneck. If you're looking for full-res output without the credit headache, check out WebAITool dot net. I built it specifically to keep tools like this accessible for free. It’s my first launch today—would love your honest feedback on the HD quality!"

Anna Souza
